projects.title: Computer Science Notes
projects.summary: A static technical hub that turns Notion notes, blog essays, search, RSS, and portfolio pages into Cloudflare Pages artifacts.
projects.problem: Technical notes are useful only if readers can navigate, search, share, and trust their formatting. The project turns a personal study corpus into a durable public knowledge system.
projects.method: Build-time Notion ingestion normalizes topic trees into static routes. A site-styling boundary renders the shell, RSS, sitemap, metadata, and search without runtime services.
projects.result: The site publishes topic hierarchies, child pages, blog posts, RSS, sitemap, MathJax-backed LaTeX, code blocks, and deterministic build checks.

projects.title: Agentic Coding Workflows
projects.summary: A public project and notes trail around controllable agent workflows, harnesses, code review, security, and maintainable AI-assisted development.
projects.problem: Agentic coding can generate software quickly, but speed without control creates reliability, security, and maintainability problems.
projects.method: Study and document agent harnesses, feedback loops, review boundaries, prompt contracts, and workflow patterns while keeping implementation habits testable.
projects.result: The site now exposes an agentic-coding topic path and public repository trail that can anchor outreach around AI engineering and tooling reliability.

projects.title: LOBForecasting
projects.summary: A public notebook project in the applied ML and forecasting cluster, useful as a case-study candidate after results and limitations are tightened.
projects.problem: Forecasting projects need to make assumptions, data constraints, evaluation choices, and failure modes visible enough for others to inspect.
projects.method: Use notebook-based exploration to model forecasting behavior, then prepare the work for a stronger project page with setup, evaluation, and limitations.
projects.result: The write-up documents a strong logistic baseline, an MLP that underperforms it, a promising DeepLOB-style validation signal, and the need for a unified reproducible evaluation harness.
